reasoning_chain_text: 1. Determine the birth years for Kamāl al-Dīn al-Fārisī and M. A. Muqtedar Khan.
2. Compare the two birth years and return the Muslim scholar born first.
original_final_question: Which Muslim scholar was born first, Kamāl al-Dīn al-Fārisī or M. A. Muqtedar Khan? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1 and Node 2: Kamāl al-Dīn al-Fārisī was born in 1267, while M. A. Muqtedar Khan was born in 1966, so Kamal al-Din Hasan ibn Ali ibn Hasan al-Farisi was born first. -> Kamal al-Din Hasan ibn Ali ibn Hasan al-Farisi
Final answer: Kamal al-Din Hasan ibn Ali ibn Hasan al-Farisi
